title: Pre 1.21.9 lighting
description: Reverts Minecraft 1.21.9s lighting to look more like 1.21.8. Main differences are cooler lighting compared to vanilla 1.21.9
body: # Pre 1.21.9 Lighting Reverts Minecraft 1.21.9s lighting to look more like 1.21.8. Main differences are cooler lighting compared to vanilla 1.21.9 Vanilla 1.21.9 Pack On 1.21.9 Vanilla 1.21.8 ## Compatability Compatible with Vanilla and Sodium, only for 1.21.9 or higher. This pack does not remove end flashes, they will appear as normal ## License Pre 1.21.9 Lighting by [ioblackshaw (a.k.a. Enchanted_Games)](https://enchanted.games/) is licensed under [CC BY-NC 4.0](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1) Video content creators may monetise videos including this work provided the license is followed.
